title: BBL Shops
description: A digital balance shops system for buying and selling, also Pinatas
body:
Shops
Overview

BBL Shops is the new way to shop. Features 3 different coins Copper, Iron and Gold each with there own value 1, 5 and 10. (These can be changed in the config). Obtained coins are automatically added to your balance which is show at the top right of your inventory. The Shop block is where all the buying and selling is done. It requires a Catalog item in the bottom right to show items that can be bought. Adds the player balance card which can be used to buy and sell items for you whilst you get on with your day 

Pinata's

This mod also allows for the creation of a pinata that spawn via a pinata flare. A Pinata can be used to spawn a loot table when broken

Data Packs

Both the shop and the pinatas can be added through data packs, for more information check out the wiki

Support

Join the BBL Discord for support, report bugs and suggest features or additions. You can also support me on Patreon to gain Alpha access to Modpacks and Mods in dev
